userOutcome: Operators can run dispatch-status for a compact one-screen summary of the dispatch state: queued features, active lanes, circuit breaker holds, and WIP capacity.
scopeSummary: Add dispatch-status subcommand to workflow_memory.py that calls list_work_orders, list_feature_lanes, list_dispatch_holds, and dispatcher_settings_cfg. Renders a compact dashboard for human mode, or JSON for --json.
readinessReason: All underlying functions exist. Just needs CLI wiring and formatting.
handoffSummary: Add dispatch-status subparser to workflow_memory.py. Handler loads work orders (list_work_orders), lanes (list_feature_lanes), holds (list_dispatch_holds), and config (dispatcher_settings_cfg). Renders: WIP used/limit, queued count, active lanes with feature/status, holds count. --json returns structured payload. Register in command dispatch table and allowlist.
